user_id.description: Id of the user designated as a hiring manager on the job. References a `/v3/users` row. The same user can be a hiring manager on multiple jobs.

job_id.description: Id of the job this hiring-manager assignment belongs to. References a `/v3/jobs` row.

description: Schema for the 'job_hiring_managers' stream, linked to the '/v3/job_hiring_managers' endpoint.
